Sydney Brenner

 
 



   
 
 

Sydney Brenner likes travelling, stirring up the scientific world, and good wine.  For more than 40 years, Dr. Brenner has been well known for his contributions to genetics and biology. His current work is allowing the application of comparative genetics to the analysis of vertebrate gene regulation. In addition, he and his coworkers Brenner have been studying vertebrate gene and genome evolution.  For many years, he has written a column called Loose Ends for  Current Biology .
